name: Founder OS - Daily Outreach Intelligence

meta.description: Generate and distribute daily outreach actions at 08:00 Europe/Oslo.

steps: Fetch daily_actions rows for current_date with joined prospect context.
Group actions by action_type: first_message, follow_up, demo_reminder, review_reply, stale_lead.
Optionally post summary to Slack and Notion.
expected_output: TRACEBUD DAILY OUTREACH summary grouped by action type.
